hub.gas_desc: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
hub.dtt_desc: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.fcttemplate_desc: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
quick_fill_placeholder: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
reinforce_step_1: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_2: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_3: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
reinforce_step_4: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
record_tip_1: Include what happened before, during, and after the behavior
quiz_opt_identify_why: To identify WHY a behavior occurs
quiz_opt_any_stops: Any behavior that stops the problem
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu: 🎯 Target behavior (what you want to reduce)
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma: What environmental change will you make?
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional: What made you feel this way? (optional)
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi: What was going on before you felt this way?

toast.autofilled_n_baseline_n_interventi: Auto-filled: N baseline + N intervention points from "N"
toast.case_study_complete_review_your_de: Case study complete! Review your debrief.
toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no: 🎉 DRO interval complete — REINFORCE! No target behavior occurred!
toast.each_phase_needs_at_least_2_data_p: Each phase needs at least 2 data points
toast.failed_to_generate_case_study_try_: Failed to generate case study. Try again.
toast.graph_data_attached_to_iep_prep: Graph data attached to IEP Prep!
toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl: Graph data ready — auto-fill available in Effect Size!
toast.mastered_n_n_consecutive_sessions_: 🎉 MASTERED! N — N consecutive sessions at criterion!
toast.merged_n_abc_entries_and_n_observa: Merged N ABC entries and N observations
toast.n_home_entries_pushed_to_abc_data: N home entries pushed to ABC data ✅
toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior: Name at least one target behavior
toast.no_valid_data_found_in_csv: No valid data found in CSV
toast.not_a_valid_alloflow_snapshot_file: Not a valid AlloFlow snapshot file
toast.not_a_valid_consent_template_file: Not a valid consent template file
toast.please_write_your_response_before_: Please write your response before submitting.
toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_: Pop-ups blocked — downloaded as HTML file instead.
toast.rate_at_least_one_item_first: Rate at least one item first
toast.session_saved_ns_n_total_responses: Session saved! Ns, N total responses
toast.speech_recognition_not_supported_i: Speech recognition not supported in this browser
ui.add_abc_entries_before_generating_a_r: Add ABC entries before generating a report.
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_progress_over_: Add ABC entries to see progress over time
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d: Add ABC entries to see visual trend data.
ui.add_connections_to_build_the_relation: Add connections to build the relationship map.
ui.ai_will_generate_visual_scenes_during: AI will generate visual scenes during the conversation (requires Imagen)
